# daytona_sandbox_parent (Data Source)

Reads the fork parent of a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_parent" "example" {
  sandbox_id_or_name = "child-sandbox"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Daytona sandbox ID or name whose parent should be read.

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `name` (String) Sandbox name.
- `state` (String) Current sandbox state.
